brand.label: Brand Message
brand.title:
Perfecting
Every Meter
brand.desc1: In the world of fashion, fabric is not just about appearance—it's the key to comfort, quality, and functionality.
brand.desc2: We are committed to creating premium, comfortable, and durable textile fabrics, offering diverse choices for global brands. From material selection to production, we strive to make every fabric the perfect partner for clothing.

about.story2018Desc: With passion for the textile industry, we officially established and began our journey pursuing fabric quality.
about.story2020Desc: Introduced advanced production equipment, established comprehensive quality management system, gained industry recognition.
about.story2021Desc: Established partnerships with 800+ brands, products sold globally, became renowned industry supplier.
about.story2026Desc: Continuously developing new fabrics, pursuing perfect combination of sustainability and quality, leading industry development.

contact.pageDesc: Looking Forward to Working with You
contact.sectionDesc: Welcome to leave a message, we will reply as soon as possible
contact.intro: Welcome to inquire about fabrics, customization and cooperation. We will reply within 24 hours.
contact.valueAddress: Room 106-107, Building 12, Del Golden Textile, Shengze Town, Wujiang District, Suzhou, Jiangsu

productsPage.cottonDesc: Natural comfort, breathable and absorbent, suitable for intimate apparel and daily wear
productsPage.linenDesc: Natural texture, breathable and fresh, suitable for summer clothing and artistic style
productsPage.stretchDesc: High elasticity, body-fitting, suitable for sports and casual wear
productsPage.twillDesc: Three-dimensional texture, outstanding quality, suitable for formal and high-end clothing
productsPage.coteDesc: Innovative fabric, highly functional, suitable for special scenarios and high-performance clothing
productsPage.feature1Desc: Selected global premium raw materials, ensuring product quality from the source
productsPage.feature2Desc: Advanced production technology, every process is refined
productsPage.feature3Desc: 1000+ color options to meet your personalized needs
productsPage.feature4Desc: Committed to sustainable development, using eco-friendly dyes and processes
